name: ai-training-center
description: One-hour hands-on AI-agent literacy training for SAP HCM consultants and SAP developers.

plugins.name: ai-training-center
plugins.description: The @ai-trainer agent facilitates a ~1-hour hands-on AI literacy session (English or German): short concept, live exercise in your own Copilot/Joule, debrief, then an HCM or Developer track.
